data.sampled:
The determinant of the matrix [5] is 5. 

Explanation: The determinant is defined as the product of the diagonal elements of the matrix. In a diagonal matrix, only the diagonal elements are non-zero, so their product equals the determinant. For the given matrix, 5 is the only diagonal element and its product is 5, which is also the determinant. ###
